calendar.matters:
Verified Proabet 850 Petition For 1. Order To Reform Conveyance Documents; And 2. Order Confirmeing Trust Ownership Of And Conveyance Of Title To Bank
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deidre Von Rock, via ZOOM, for Catherine Wood, Petitioner.

The court advises counsel of its issue with the use of the probate code to effect a quiet title action which would not be within its jurisdiction. Counsel reports regarding what the Trustee is seeking from this court via her petition and that the property is ready to sell but that errors had been made on various deeds used for trust transfers some time ago and now the title company has encountered this issue regarding the title. Counsel points the court to several probate and CCP codes and offers additional testimony in advocacy of her petition. The court advises counsel that it has no issue with the 850 portion of her petition and that it intends to take the matter under submission to review and consider the other sections of the petition.

The Probate 850 Petition For, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not reported.

Verified Proabet 850 Petition For 1. Order To Reform Conveyance Documents; And 2. Order Confirmeing Trust Ownership Of And Conveyance Of Title To Bank
Off Calendar Jan-24-2022 Continued To Mar-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
